evidence.correctness_and_freshness: docs_unavailable; internal inconsistency: uses paytm-pg python SDK (likely unmaintained / not on PyPI under that name) and a frontend script URL 'securegw.paytm.in/merchantpgp/complianceValidator.js' that does not match the canonical Paytm Checkout JS bundle (typically /merchantpgpui/checkoutjs/merchants/<MID>.js). The JS bridge invocation uses window.Paytm.CheckoutJS.onNewWindowLoad/getLibrary/invoke pattern which is partially correct but combined with the wrong script source it will not load CheckoutJS. Long-tail handling: inconsistent + no version => low.
evidence.executability: Multiple fixes needed: paytm-pg package likely uninstallable; CheckoutJS script URL wrong so window.Paytm undefined at runtime; CRA's index.html lives in public/ not src/ (header text says src/index.html); fastapi_limiter referenced without import/setup; TrustedHostMiddleware not imported. Also troubleshooting suggests ngrok (sandbox-infeasible pattern) though only in a table, not as a required step.
evidence.completeness: All six pieces present: credentials acquisition, install bash, .env template, backend code, frontend code, test commands. However env var CLIENT_ID is used in config/service but not declared in .env template (mismatch). Some duplicate Paytm invoke logic.
evidence.citation_anchoring: Multiple official business.paytm.com and paytmpayments.com URLs cited, numbered inline near relevant sections (e.g., [2] near SDK init, [6] near JS script). Matches canonical domain business.paytm.com/docs.

rubric_notes: ngrok appears only in a troubleshooting table, not as a required step, so EXECUTABILITY cap not strictly triggered; still kept at 2 due to wrong CheckoutJS script URL and dubious paytm-pg package.
